components.name: faster-whisper
modifications: Used as a pinned PyPI dependency behind Hina's SttProvider interface; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
Hina locks language=vi and task=transcribe, adds deterministic pre-VAD, bounded admission, no-retention and GPU ResourceLease enforcement.

components.name: vieneu
modifications: Used as a pinned PyPI dependency behind Hina's TtsProvider interface; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
Hina instantiates the pinned ONNX engine through version-specific internal APIs so both model and codec snapshots remain exact-revision local paths.
Hina restricts the integration to CPU int8, one allowlisted preset voice, audio watermarking, bounded admission, cancellation, pre-TTS moderation and no retention or voice cloning.

components.name: qdrant-client
modifications: Used as a pinned PyPI dependency behind Hina's DerivedMemoryIndex interface; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
Hina uses persistent local mode with no network listener and treats the vector collection as rebuildable derived state rather than authoritative memory.

components.name: electron
modifications: Used as an exact npm development dependency for the local desktop main and preload processes; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
Hina enables Chromium sandboxing and context isolation, disables Node integration and webview, and exposes only six named preload operations.

components.name: vue
modifications: Used as an exact npm renderer dependency; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
The Hina renderer contains only presentation state and calls a repository-owned typed preload facade.

components.name: vite
modifications: Used as an exact npm build dependency; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
The build uses repository-authored local-file paths and emits no remote runtime dependency.

components.name: @vitejs/plugin-vue
modifications: Used as an exact npm build dependency for Vue single-file components; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.

components.name: typescript
modifications: Used as an exact npm build and type-check dependency; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
TypeScript 7 is deliberately excluded because vue-tsc 3.3.8 cannot resolve the compiler subpath after the TypeScript 7 package export change.

components.name: vue-tsc
modifications: Used as an exact npm Vue type-check dependency; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.

components.name: @types/node
modifications: Used as an exact npm type-definition dependency; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
